sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95645" key="sofismatiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σοφ-ισμᾰτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n95645.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sophistical</tr_>, of a person, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gell.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18.13</biblScope> </bibl> (v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
